CREATE TABLE h3_index_table (id UInt64, index UInt64, resolution UInt8);
SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_index_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_index_table WHERE resolution = 0;
SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_index_table WHERE resolution = 15;
SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_index_table WHERE index IN (SELECT index FROM h3_index_table WHERE resolution = 3);
SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM (SELECT index, resolution FROM h3_index_table) WHERE resolution <= 3;
CREATE TABLE derived_table AS SELECT id, h3ToParent(index, resolution) AS parent FROM h3_index_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM derived_table WHERE parent IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT h3ToParent(index, resolution) FROM h3_index_table) AS parent_indexes SELECT AVG(parent_indexes) FROM derived_table;
SELECT id, h3ToParent(index, 0) AS parent FROM h3_index_table UNION SELECT id, h3ToParent(index, 15) AS parent FROM h3_index_table WHERE resolution = 15;
